chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1977 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 19.12.2016. Mr. Mashooque Ali Bhurgari, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Ghulam Mustafa Bhatti, SHO P.S Nindo and SIP Muhammad Bux Chandio, SHO P.S Kadhan. All the private respondents are present in person. -.-.-. Private respondents are in attendance, who were ordered to be on last date of hearing. They have denied their involvement in any illegal act as alleged by the petitioners. According to the petitioners’ Counsel, when the petitioners approached the Respondents No.2 and 3, concerned SHOs of P.S Nindo Shehar and Kadhan, they avoided to entertain the complaint of petitioners. This petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials will ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners in any manner whatsoever and if petitioners approach police officials for providing protection and/or lodging any FIR, the same shall be dealt with strictly in accordance with law and legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners. Both the SHOs present today in Court have further undertaken that they will abide by the terms of this order in letter and spirit. It is further clarified that violation of this order will be construed as disobedience. JUDGE Ali Haider
